Bash(python3 -c "
import csv
import io

filepath = r''c:\\Users\\anany\\Downloads\\files \(4\)\\data.csv''

with open\(filepath, ''r'', newline=''''\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

lines = content.split\(''\\n''\)
header = lines[0]
new_lines = [header]

row_num = 0
for i in range\(1, len\(lines\)\):
    line = lines[i].strip\(\)
    if not line:
        continue
    row_num += 1
    # Find the last comma and replace everything after it
    last_comma = line.rfind\('',''\)
    new_img = f''img/{row_num:03d}.jpg''
    new_line = line[:last_comma+1] + new_img
    new_lines.append\(new_line\)

# Write back with trailing newline
with open\(filepath, ''w'', newline=''''\) as f:
    f.write\(''\\n''.join\(new_lines\) + ''\\n''\)

print\(f''Processed {row_num} data rows''\)
")
